name: ApplicationFormBase
summary: The ApplicationFormBase class is the base class for all Tekla Structures dialogs. The class provides localization, unit conversion and data storage (temporary and file-based) among other things.

constructors.name: ApplicationFormBase
constructors.summary: The default constructor that does not need parameters. Initializes the form and registers property bindings.

methods.name: ApplyValues
methods.summary: Loads the dialog values from a file and performs Apply. on the loaded values. To match the files to a certain dialog, the file suffix is set as the dialog type's name.

methods.name: GetConnectionStatus
methods.summary: Returns true if a proper connection to the Tekla Structures process has been established. Currently, there's no way to re-establish the connection.

methods.name: InitializeForm
methods.summary: Prepares the data storage for the dialog and scans through the fields.

methods.name: LoadValues
methods.summary: Loads the dialog values from a file. To match the files to a certain dialog, the file suffix is set as the dialog type's name.

methods.name: ModifyValues
methods.summary: Loads the dialog values from a file and performs Modify. on the loaded values. To match the files to a certain dialog, the file suffix is set as the dialog type's name.

methods.name: SaveValues
methods.summary: Serializes the dialog values to an xml file.

methods.name: SetAttributeValue
methods.summary: Sets a value for the given control. When the dialog is not shown, setting a property directly for a control (such as textBox1.Text = "text") will not work for controls that have a Tekla Structures AttributeTypeName set. This method is going to have to be used to set the value.

methods.name: UpdateValues
methods.summary: Rereads and updates all the field values on the form.

properties.name: Localization
properties.summary: The localization instance for the dialog. Each dialog has its own localization instance that has read the localization files needed for that dialog.
